title: Amtech T0735 70mm Security Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 70mm chrome plated security padlock has a 10m diameter hardened steel shackle with a hardened double ball locking mechanism
VERSATILE: Supplied with 4 keys, it is ideal for a wide range of security applications
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 70mm Security Padlock See more
